# 46. Complete 86-Screen Action and Button Matrix

Every listed action is evaluated server-side. `Visible` means the user
has the base permission and the record is in scope. `Enabled`
additionally requires the valid record state, prerequisites, no
separation-of-duties conflict and a current record version.

## 46.1 AUTH-01 --- Login

  --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Action           Visible to                                         Enabled when      Confirmation   Audit
  ---------------- -------------------------------------------------- ----------------- -------------- ---------------
  Submit or        All users with `auth-01.submit_or_continue`        Permission +      Required       Required
  continue         permission                                         scope + valid                    
                                                                      state +                          
                                                                      prerequisites +                  
                                                                      current version                  

  Back to previous All users with                                     Permission +      Not required   Access-policy
  authentication   `auth-01.back_to_previous_authentication_step`     scope + valid                    dependent
  step             permission                                         state +                          
                                                                      prerequisites +                  
                                                                      current version                  

  Show/hide        All users with                                     Permission +      Not required   Access-policy
  password where   `auth-01.show_or_hide_password_where_applicable`   scope + valid                    dependent
  applicable       permission                                         state +                          
                                                                      prerequisites +                  
                                                                      current version                  

  Request help or  All users with `auth-01.request_help_or_recovery`  Permission +      Not required   Access-policy
  recovery         permission                                         scope + valid                    dependent
                                                                      state +                          
                                                                      prerequisites +                  
                                                                      current version                  
  --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 46.2 AUTH-02 --- Forgot Password

  --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Action           Visible to                                         Enabled when      Confirmation   Audit
  ---------------- -------------------------------------------------- ----------------- -------------- ---------------
  Submit or        All users with `auth-02.submit_or_continue`        Permission +      Required       Required
  continue         permission                                         scope + valid                    
                                                                      state +                          
                                                                      prerequisites +                  
                                                                      current version                  

  Back to previous All users with                                     Permission +      Not required   Access-policy
  authentication   `auth-02.back_to_previous_authentication_step`     scope + valid                    dependent
  step             permission                                         state +                          
                                                                      prerequisites +                  
                                                                      current version                  

  Show/hide        All users with                                     Permission +      Not required   Access-policy
  password where   `auth-02.show_or_hide_password_where_applicable`   scope + valid                    dependent
  applicable       permission                                         state +                          
                                                                      prerequisites +                  
                                                                      current version                  

  Request help or  All users with `auth-02.request_help_or_recovery`  Permission +      Not required   Access-policy
  recovery         permission                                         scope + valid                    dependent
                                                                      state +                          
                                                                      prerequisites +                  
                                                                      current version                  
  --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 46.3 AUTH-03 --- Reset Password

  --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Action           Visible to                                         Enabled when      Confirmation   Audit
  ---------------- -------------------------------------------------- ----------------- -------------- ---------------

# 47. Complete List/Table Registry

For screens that are form/detail workspaces, the registry explicitly
marks the page as non-list. For list/work-queue screens, the exact base
columns are taken from the controlled screen specification and all rows
use server-side authorization.

# 48. Complete RBAC Resource--Action Matrix

Legend: `A` allowed within scope; `R` read-only; `C`
conditional/separate permission; `—` denied by default.

  ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Module   Super   Programme   Procurement   National    Regional   Warehouse   Logistics   School     Inspector   Auditor/M&E
           Admin   Admin                     Warehouse   Officer    Officer                 Receiver               
  -------- ------- ----------- ------------- ----------- ---------- ----------- ----------- ---------- ----------- -------------
  AUTH     C       C           C             C           C          C           C           C          C           R

  DASH     R       R           R             R           R          R           R           R          R           R

  BOOK     C       C           C             C           C          C           ---         ---        ---         R

  PLAN     ---     C           ---           ---         C          ---         ---         ---        ---         R

  PROC     ---     ---         C             C           ---        ---         ---         ---        ---         R

  INV      ---     ---         ---           C           C          C           ---         ---        ---         R

  SHIP     ---     C           ---           C           C          C           C           ---        ---         R

  LOG      ---     ---         ---           ---         C          ---         C           ---        ---         R

  POD      ---     ---         ---           ---         C          ---         ---         C          ---         R

  VER      ---     ---         ---           ---         C          ---         ---         ---        C           R

  EXC      ---     C           C             C           C          C           C           ---        C           R

  REP      R       R           R             R           R          ---         R           ---        ---         R

  ADM      A       ---         ---           ---         ---        ---         ---         ---        ---         R
  ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 48.1 Permission naming convention

Every actionable permission is explicit:

`{resource}.{action}`

Examples: `allocation.create`, `allocation.review`,
`allocation.approve`, `shipment.pick`, `shipment.pack`,
`shipment.approve`, `shipment.dispatch`, `delivery.receive`,
`pod.submit`, `verification.perform`, `exception.resolve`,
`audit.export`.

`C` in the matrix means the role may receive only the explicit
permissions required for its assigned duty. It does not grant all module
actions.

# 49. Complete State-Transition Matrix

  ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Aggregate       From                Action               To                  Required permission              Prohibited
                                                                                                                conditions
  --------------- ------------------- -------------------- ------------------- -------------------------------- --------------------
  Campaign        Draft               submit               Active/Planned      `campaign.submit`                invalid dates/scope

  Demand          Draft               calculate            Calculated          `demand.calculate`               missing
  calculation                                                                                                   enrollment/rules

  Demand          Calculated          freeze               Frozen              `demand.freeze`                  unresolved blocking
  calculation                                                                                                   anomaly

  Allocation      Draft               submit_review        Under Review        `allocation.submit`              invalid totals

  Allocation      Under Review        send_for_approval    Pending Approval    `allocation.review`              reviewer conflict

  Allocation      Pending Approval    approve              Approved/Locked     `allocation.approve`             SOD conflict/stale
                                                                                                                version

  Allocation      Pending Approval    reject               Rejected            `allocation.approve`             reason missing

  Procurement     Draft               submit               Submitted           `procurement_order.submit`       invalid lines
  order                                                                                                         

  Procurement     Submitted           approve              Approved            `procurement_order.approve`      SOD conflict
  order                                                                                                         

  Receipt         Expected            arrive               Provisional         `stock_receipt.create`           wrong
                                                                                                                destination/source

  Receipt         Provisional         inspect_accept       Posted              `stock_receipt.inspect`          invalid quantities

  Adjustment      Requested           approve              Approved            `inventory_adjustment.approve`   SOD
                                                                                                                conflict/evidence
                                                                                                                missing

  Adjustment      Approved            post                 Posted              `inventory_adjustment.post`      stale
                                                                                                                balance/version

  Shipment        Draft               reserve              Picking             `shipment.create`                insufficient
                                                                                                                available stock

  Shipment        Picking             complete_pick        Picked              `shipment.pick`                  unresolved short
                                                                                                                pick

  Shipment        Picked              complete_pack        Packed              `shipment.pack`                  package-line
                                                                                                                mismatch

  Shipment        Packed              submit_approval      Pending Approval    `shipment.submit`                incomplete
                                                                                                                package/seal data

  Shipment        Pending Approval    approve              Approved            `shipment.approve`               SOD conflict

  Shipment        Pending Approval    reject               Rejected            `shipment.approve`               reason missing

  Shipment        Approved            dispatch             In Transit          `shipment.dispatch`              no trip/handover;
                                                                                                                stale version

  Shipment        In Transit          receive_partial      Partially Received  `delivery.receive`               unauthorized
                                                                                                                receiver

  Shipment        In                  receive_complete     Received            `delivery.receive`               invalid actual count
                  Transit/Partially                                                                             
                  Received                                                                                      

  POD             Draft               submit               Submitted/Locked    `pod.submit`                     receiver/evidence
                                                                                                                rules unmet

  Verification    Queued              assign               Assigned            `verification.assign`            inspector conflict

  Verification    Assigned            start                In Progress         `verification.perform`           assignment expired

  Verification    In Progress         submit_result        Completed           `verification.perform`           evidence/checklist
                                                                                                                incomplete

  Exception       Open                assign               Assigned            `exception.assign`               owner missing

  Exception       Assigned            investigate          Investigating       `exception.investigate`          ---

  Exception       Investigating       submit_resolution    Pending             `exception.resolve`              corrective action
                                                           Approval/Resolved                                    incomplete

  Exception       Pending Approval    approve_resolution   Resolved            `exception.approve_resolution`   SOD conflict

  Exception       Resolved            close                Closed              `exception.close`                follow-up incomplete

  Access          Pending             activate             Active              `access.assign`                  privilege/SOD
  assignment                                                                                                    conflict

  Access          Active              revoke               Revoked             `access.revoke`                  ---
  assignment                                                                                                    

  Configuration   Draft               approve              Approved            `configuration.approve`          validation
                                                                                                                failure/SOD conflict

  Configuration   Approved            activate             Effective           `configuration.activate`         effective-date
                                                                                                                conflict
  ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

All transitions not listed are denied by default with HTTP `409`.

# 50. Enum and Reference-Data Catalogue

  ---------------------------------------------------------------------
  Enum                               Values
  ---------------------------------- ----------------------------------
  ApprovalStatus                     `draft`, `under_review`,
                                     `pending_approval`, `approved`,
                                     `rejected`, `locked`, `retired`

  Severity                           `low`, `medium`, `high`,
                                     `critical`

  StockCondition                     `good`, `damaged`, `quarantined`,
                                     `rejected`

  StockMovementType                  `receipt`, `reservation`,
                                     `dispatch`, `transfer`, `return`,
                                     `adjustment`, `write_off`,
                                     `reversal`

  ShipmentStatus                     `draft`, `picking`, `picked`,
                                     `packing`, `packed`,
                                     `pending_approval`, `approved`,
                                     `rejected`, `dispatched`,
                                     `in_transit`,
                                     `partially_received`, `received`,
                                     `closed`, `cancelled`

  TripStatus                         `planned`, `assigned`, `active`,
                                     `delayed`, `incident`, `arrived`,
                                     `closed`, `cancelled`

  DiscrepancyType                    `shortage`, `excess`, `damage`,
                                     `wrong_title`, `seal_issue`,
                                     `refusal`, `other`

  VerificationResult                 `verified`, `partially_verified`,
                                     `failed`

  VerificationStatus                 `queued`, `assigned`,
                                     `in_progress`,
                                     `evidence_complete`, `submitted`,
                                     `completed`, `closed`

  ExceptionStatus                    `open`, `assigned`,
                                     `investigating`,
                                     `awaiting_information`,
                                     `corrective_action`,
                                     `pending_approval`, `resolved`,
                                     `rejected`, `reopened`, `closed`

  MFAFactorType                      `totp`, `sms`, `email`,
                                     `recovery_code`

  ExportFormat                       `csv`, `xlsx`, `pdf`

  ReportJobStatus                    `queued`, `running`, `completed`,
                                     `failed`, `expired`, `cancelled`
  ---------------------------------------------------------------------

Reference data such as subjects, education levels, languages,
geographies, school types, curricula and reason codes are versioned
master data, not hard-coded UI strings.

# 51. OpenAPI-Level Operation Contract Catalogue

The following contract rules apply to every operation in Section 33:

-   Request and response content type: `application/json`, except binary
    evidence/export download.
-   Authentication: secure session or bearer token, unless explicitly
    public authentication endpoint.
-   Every operation has a stable `operationId`.
-   Mutating operations define a JSON request schema and domain-error
    set.
-   Critical commands require `Idempotency-Key`.
-   Concurrency-sensitive updates require `If-Match` or
    `record_version`.
-   Success responses use the common envelope in Section 23.
-   Validation failures return `422`; state conflicts `409`;
    authorization `403`; inaccessible/nonexistent scoped records `404`.

  ------------------------------------------------------------
  Method Path operationId Request Success Domain Idempotency
  response errors
  ------------------------------------------------------------

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 51.1 Schema requirements

Every named resource schema includes: - `id: uuid` - `business_number`
where applicable - `status` - `record_version: integer` - `created_at`,
`created_by` - `updated_at`, `updated_by` - resource-specific fields
from Section 45.

Every command schema includes only fields writable for that command;
clients cannot mass-assign status, audit fields or privileged ownership
fields.

# 52. Logical Database Schema

The following column-level baseline is authoritative for core
transactional tables. Additional audit timestamps follow the common
convention.

  ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Table                     Required core columns          Primary/foreign keys Critical indexes/constraints
  ------------------------- ------------------------------ -------------------- ----------------------------------------------
  users                     id, full_name, official_email, PK id                UQ official_email
                            phone, status, mfa_required                         

  roles                     id, code, name, status         PK id                UQ code

  permissions               id, code, description          PK id                UQ code

  role_assignments          id, user_id, role_id,          FK user_id, role_id  IDX user/effective dates
                            effective_from, effective_to,                       
                            status                                              

  scope_assignments         id, role_assignment_id,        FK                   IDX scope_type/scope_id
                            scope_type, scope_id           role_assignment_id   

  schools                   id, code, name, geography_id,  FK geography_id      UQ code
                            school_type_id, status                              

  warehouses                id, code, name, geography_id,  FK geography_id      UQ code
                            capacity, status                                    

  storage_locations         id, warehouse_id, code, status FK warehouse_id      UQ warehouse/code

  textbooks                 id, code, title, subject_id,   FK subject_id,       UQ code
                            level_id, language_code,       level_id             
                            status                                              

  textbook_editions         id, textbook_id,               FK textbook_id       IDX textbook/effective dates
                            edition_label, effective_from,                      
                            effective_to                                        

  textbook_identifiers      id, textbook_id,               FK textbook_id       UQ identifier_type/value
                            identifier_type, value,                             
                            is_primary, status                                  

  textbook_batches          id, textbook_id, batch_code,   FK textbook_id,      UQ batch_code
                            supplier_id, print_date,       supplier_id          
                            status                                              

  campaigns                 id, code, name, academic_year, PK id                UQ code
                            start_date, end_date, status                        

  enrollment_snapshots      id, campaign_id, school_id,    FK campaign_id,      UQ campaign/school/version
                            captured_at, source, version   school_id            

  school_requirements       id, campaign_id, school_id,    FKs                  UQ campaign/school/textbook
                            textbook_id, required_qty,                          
                            status                                              

  demand_calculations       id, campaign_id,               FK campaign_id       IDX campaign/status
                            enrollment_snapshot_version,                        
                            rule_set_version, status                            

  demand_lines              id, calculation_id, school_id, FKs                  UQ calculation/school/textbook
                            textbook_id, demand_qty                             

  allocation_versions       id, campaign_id, version_no,   FK campaign_id/users UQ campaign/version_no
                            status, submitted_by,                               
                            approved_by                                         

  allocation_lines          id, allocation_version_id,     FKs                  UQ version/school/textbook; nonnegative checks
                            school_id, textbook_id,                             
                            approved_qty, reserved_qty,                         
                            dispatched_qty, received_qty,                       
                            verified_qty                                        

  suppliers                 id, code, legal_name,          PK id                UQ code
                            registration_no, status                             

  procurement_orders        id, order_no, supplier_id,     FKs                  UQ order_no
                            campaign_id, status,                                
                            expected_date                                       

  procurement_order_lines   id, order_id, textbook_id,     FKs                  nonnegative checks
                            batch_id, ordered_qty,                              
                            delivered_qty                                       

  expected_deliveries       id, order_id, warehouse_id,    FKs                  IDX warehouse/expected_at/status
                            expected_at, status                                 

  stock_receipts            id, receipt_no, source_type,   FK warehouse_id      UQ receipt_no
                            source_id, warehouse_id,                            
                            received_at, status                                 

  stock_receipt_lines       id, receipt_id, textbook_id,   FKs                  quantity checks
                            batch_id, received_qty,                             
                            accepted_qty, rejected_qty                          

  inventory_balances        id, warehouse_id,              FKs                  UQ
                            storage_location_id,                                warehouse/location/textbook/batch/condition;
                            textbook_id, batch_id,                              nonnegative
                            condition, on_hand, reserved,                       
                            quarantined                                         

  inventory_ledger          id, warehouse_id, textbook_id, FKs                  immutable; IDX warehouse/textbook/time
                            batch_id, movement_type,                            
                            quantity_delta, source_type,                        
                            source_id, occurred_at                              

  stock_adjustments         id, warehouse_id, batch_id,    FKs                  SOD check in service
                            quantity_delta, reason_code,                        
                            status, requested_by,                               
                            approved_by                                         

  shipments                 id, shipment_no, campaign_id,  FKs                  UQ shipment_no; IDX status/date
                            source_warehouse_id,                                
                            destination_type,                                   
                            destination_id, status,                             
                            record_version                                      

  shipment_lines            id, shipment_id, textbook_id,  FKs                  quantity checks
                            batch_id, planned_qty,                              
                            picked_qty, packed_qty,                             
                            dispatched_qty, received_qty                        

  packages                  id, shipment_id, package_code, FK shipment_id       UQ package_code
                            seal_no, weight, status                             

  package_lines             id, package_id,                FKs                  UQ package/shipment_line
                            shipment_line_id, quantity                          

  dispatches                id, shipment_id, trip_id,      FKs                  UQ shipment_id
                            handed_to_actor_id,                                 
                            departed_at                                         

  vehicles                  id, registration_no,           PK id                UQ registration_no
                            vehicle_type, capacity_kg,                          
                            status                                              

  transport_actors          id, actor_type, identifier,    PK id                UQ identifier
                            name, status                                        

  trips                     id, trip_no, vehicle_id,       FKs                  UQ trip_no
                            driver_id, status,                                  
                            planned_departure,                                  
                            actual_departure                                    

  tracking_events           id, trip_id, source_type,      FK trip_id           IDX trip/occurred_at
                            latitude, longitude,                                
                            status_code, occurred_at                            

  delivery_receipts         id, shipment_id, school_id,    FKs                  UQ active final receipt per shipment
                            receiver_user_id, received_at,                      
                            status, record_version                              

  delivery_receipt_lines    id, receipt_id,                FKs                  quantity checks
                            shipment_line_id,                                   
                            expected_qty, received_qty,                         
                            damaged_qty                                         

  proofs_of_delivery        id, shipment_id, receipt_id,   FKs                  UQ shipment_id
                            receiver_user_id,                                   
                            submitted_at,                                       
                            signature_asset_id                                  

  delivery_discrepancies    id, shipment_id,               FKs                  IDX shipment/status
                            shipment_line_id, type,                             
                            expected_qty, actual_qty,                           
                            status                                              

  verifications             id, verification_no,           FKs                  UQ verification_no
                            shipment_id, school_id,                             
                            inspector_id, status, result,                       
                            due_at                                              

  verification_lines        id, verification_id,           FKs                  UQ verification/shipment_line
                            shipment_line_id,                                   
                            expected_qty, received_qty,                         
                            observed_qty                                        

  evidence_assets           id, owner_type, owner_id,      polymorphic          UQ storage_key; IDX owner
                            storage_key, checksum,         controlled owner     
                            media_type, captured_at,                            
                            status                                              

  exceptions                id, exception_no, type,        FKs where typed      UQ exception_no; IDX status/severity/due
                            severity, owner_id, due_at,                         
                            status, source_type, source_id                      

  corrective_actions        id, exception_id, owner_id,    FKs                  IDX exception/status
                            action_text, due_at, status                         

  audit_events              id, actor_id, action,          FK actor_id          append-only; IDX aggregate/time, actor/time
                            aggregate_type, aggregate_id,                       
                            before_json, after_json,                            
                            occurred_at, request_id                             

  idempotency_keys          id, key, actor_id,             FK actor_id          UQ actor_id/key
                            request_hash, response_status,                      
                            response_body_hash, expires_at                      

  sync_operations           id, operation_id, device_id,   FK user_id           UQ operation_id
                            user_id, task_id,                                   
                            base_record_version,                                
                            payload_hash, status                                
  ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# 53. Migration and Deletion Rules

-   Migrations are forward-versioned and reviewed.
-   Destructive schema changes require a compatibility migration and
    verified backup.
-   Posted transactional records are never hard-deleted through product
    workflows.
-   Master data referenced by transactions is retired/deactivated, not
    deleted.
-   PII deletion/anonymization, where legally required, must preserve
    non-identifying transaction integrity and audit obligations.
-   Enum changes are backward compatible or accompanied by explicit data
    migration.
-   Rollback procedures must not corrupt append-only ledger/audit
    history.

# 54. Concrete Test Catalogue --- 344 Minimum Screen Tests

Every screen has four mandatory baseline tests below. Domain critical
paths in Section 28 add further integration tests.

## 54.1 AUTH-01 --- Login

  -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  Test ID                 Preconditions / steps   Expected result
  ----------------------- ----------------------- -----------------------
  `TC-AUTH-01-HAPPY`      Authorized All users    Expected data/actions
                          opens Login and         are available;
                          completes the primary   successful operation
                          permitted workflow.     persists and audit
                                                  requirements are met.

  `TC-AUTH-01-AUTHZ`      User without `auth-01`  Server denies with
                          permission or outside   403/404 as appropriate;
                          scope attempts          no protected data or
                          access/action.          mutation is exposed.

  `TC-AUTH-01-VALID`      Submit invalid, missing Server returns stable
                          or boundary-value data  422 validation errors;
                          on Login.               no partial mutation
                                                  occurs; user input is
                                                  recoverable where safe.

  `TC-AUTH-01-STATE`      Attempt an action from  Server returns 409;
                          an invalid/stale state  authoritative
                          or stale record version state/version is
                          on Login.               preserved; no duplicate
                                                  side effect occurs.
  -----------------------------------------------------------------------

# 55. Requirement Traceability Rule

Every normative statement using **must**, **shall**, **required**,
**prohibited**, or an explicit acceptance criterion receives a
requirement ID during implementation planning.

Traceability table:

  -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  Requirement Source Screen/API Test ID(s) Implementation Defect/retest
  ID section status
  -----------------------------------------------------------------------

------------------------------------------------------------------------

No production sign-off is valid while a critical/high requirement lacks
a passing test or an approved risk acceptance.

# 56. SLA and Deployment-Policy Configuration Registry

Values are configuration, not hidden code constants.

  -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Configuration key                     Purpose             Required before
                                                            production
  ------------------------------------- ------------------- -------------------
  `sla.allocation_review_hours`         Allocation review   Yes
                                        escalation          

  `sla.shipment_approval_hours`         Dispatch approval   Yes
                                        escalation          

  `sla.exception_low_hours`             Low-severity        Yes
                                        exception SLA       

  `sla.exception_medium_hours`          Medium-severity     Yes
                                        exception SLA       

  `sla.exception_high_hours`            High-severity       Yes
                                        exception SLA       

  `sla.exception_critical_hours`        Critical exception  Yes
                                        SLA                 

  `sla.verification_acceptance_hours`   Inspector           Yes
                                        acceptance SLA      

  `sla.verification_completion_hours`   Verification        Yes
                                        completion SLA      

  `tracking.stale_after_minutes`        Stale tracking      Yes
                                        threshold           

  `security.session_idle_minutes`       Idle session        Yes
                                        timeout             

  `security.session_absolute_hours`     Absolute session    Yes
                                        lifetime            

  `retention.audit_days`                Audit retention     Yes,
                                                            policy-approved

  `retention.evidence_days`             Evidence retention  Yes,
                                                            policy-approved

  `dr.rpo_minutes`                      Recovery point      Yes
                                        objective           

  `dr.rto_minutes`                      Recovery time       Yes
                                        objective           
  -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

The system validates that required production configuration is present
before go-live.

# 57. Final Consistency and Quality Gates

The specification artifact passes the following static checks:

-   exactly 86 controlled screens;
-   no duplicate controlled screen IDs;
-   exactly 86 unique screen-level contracts;
-   field dictionary entries for every controlled screen;
-   action matrix entries for every controlled screen;
-   list/table registry entry for every controlled screen;
-   authoritative domain API catalogue present;
-   RBAC matrix present;
-   state-transition matrix present;
-   enum/reference catalogue present;
-   logical database schema present;
-   minimum 344 screen-level baseline tests present;
-   known duplicate Section 13 heading removed.

Implementation completeness still requires executing tests and supplying
deployment-specific approved values; a specification cannot truthfully
certify software that has not yet been built and tested.
